source_jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Sierra Studio

When you apply to Sierra, you join an ecosystem. We specialize in connecting talented Brazilian professionals with exciting career opportunities in a highly-vetted small community of growing companies in the US. Applying to Sierra seamlessly integrates you into this ecosystem, granting automatic eligibility for all relevant opportunities we offer.



About our hiring partner

Our hiring partner is a platform that simplifies third-party insurance compliance management with smart tools and expert guidance. They help proactively identify and address coverage gaps, automate tracking and notifications, and collaborate with partners across the construction industry.



About the role

As an AI Engineer, you will develop AI pipelines and lead feature development to help bring the clients product to market. You will also maintain the codebase, build eval pipelines, do AI research, improve infrastructure, write documentation and tests, manage infrastructure, and work with peers to bring the best product to market. As part of a new and growing team within an existing organization, you will be instrumental in shaping the engineering culture surrounding this new product offering.



What You'll Do

 - Engineer solutions for real problems - Understand, design, and deploy solutions using AI/ML models for real problems

 - Own platform stability and maintenance – Manage the deployment lifecycle of new features and fixes, ensure the platform is stable, scalable, and has good observability.

 - Craft high-quality code – Produce clear and efficient code, actively engage in code reviews, and champion technological excellence.

 - Write tech specs – Translate business needs into creative and technically robust solutions.

 - Engage with cross-functional partners – Collaborate closely with product and stakeholders to drive the success of the project.

 - Document thoroughly – Create comprehensive technical documentation, simplifying the onboarding process for newcomers.

 - Refine best practices – Proactively seek and implement improvements in engineering and organizational workflows.

 - Drive engineering planning and processes - Participate in sprint planning, effort estimation, capacity planning, and release management.

 - Architect and evolve the overall stack - Guide technology decisions and stack improvements; anticipate scaling challenges.



What We're Looking For

 - 7+ years of experience as an AI engineer, with at least 2 years in a senior role

 - Experience working with LangGraph

 - Experience deploying end to end AI solutions to real customers

 - Experience creating and maintaining eval pipelines

 - Familiarity with document processing and OCR tools

 - Experience with relational databases (e.g. PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc)

 - Experience with Google Cloud Platform products

 - Growth mindset: able to quickly learn new languages, frameworks, and more

 - Strong written and verbal communicator in English



Who We're Looking For

We seek a self-motivated individual with a proactive attitude. We try to keep our egos out of the workplace, so we are looking for someone who values learning and doesn’t mind being wrong. Given our fast-paced and dynamic environment, excellent upfront communication skills are a must for this role. The ideal candidate should possess the drive to complete tasks with minimal supervision and be able to articulate technical concepts clearly.

source_jobs.title: Entrepreneur in Residence (EIR)
source_jobs.description:
🧑‍🚀 JOB TITLE: ENTREPRENEUR IN RESIDENCE (EIR)

Location: United States (flexible) or Brazil
Employment Type: Full Time
Location Type: Remote
Department: Sierra – EIR
Compensation: Cash & Equity





🏔️ ABOUT SIERRA STUDIO

Sierra is an AI First engineering studio and tech incubator. We turn our customers’ ideas into reality! We’re based in Los Angeles, but our teammates live all around the world.

We do everything with an AI First approach, including coding, building our own tooling, and exploring incubating ideas that get traction internally.




💼 ABOUT THE ROLE

An EIR is somebody who wants to start their own company and is actively experimenting to prepare.

The idea of an EIR has existed for a while. Mostly in the context of the venture studio model, in which traditional VC is combined with some sort of talent program to incubate businesses. Our version of the role is slightly different.

Sierra is a talent focused organization, but Sierra is self funded through revenue and not the traditional VC model. Our advantage is our team and the understanding we gain while building. Our engineering & hiring services work is a unique opportunity to explore different domains and technologies in a short time to inspire your future startup’s vision.

Sierra EIRs are responsible for leading client projects AND encouraged to start a new business leveraging our resources & ecosystem. EIRs are also involved with building our company AI First. Our environment uniquely evolves our people’s understanding, ideas, and skills to build next-gen companies.




🧠 WHAT MAKES A GREAT EIR?

We’re looking for entrepreneurial minds with a bias to action and a systems-thinking lens. You might be an engineer, a product thinker, or a domain expert who’s felt the itch to build something of your own.



🧬 Core Skills

 - High curiosity and fast learning ability
   

 - Strong systems thinking
   

 - Clear communicator across ideas and execution
   

 - Emotionally intelligent and low ego
   

 - Background in engineering, product, or an industry domain
   

 - Deep understanding of (or excitement about) AI-first thinking
   

🎁 Bonus Points

 - Strong product sense or design chops
   

 - Solid coding or architecture experience
   

 - Experience with ML, LLMs, or data science
   

 - A personal brand or strong professional network
   

 - Experience as a 2nd+ time founder




🔧 DAY IN THE LIFE OF AN EIR

If you’re coming from a product or engineering background, this version of the EIR experience is for you.

It’s geared toward builders who think in systems, tools, and products.

Through client work and internal initiatives, you’ll:

 - Gain rapid exposure to a variety of domains and technologies
   

 - Identify recurring patterns and unmet needs across industries
   

 - Develop Sierra’s internal AI Roadmap (internal tools, research, experiments)
   

 - Contribute to the design and iteration of early-stage AI products
   

Over time, you’ll chart your own path:

 - 🚀 Found a new company
   

 - 🤝 Join another Sierra incubation as a co-founder
   

 - 🧭 Step into a technical leadership role within Sierra




🌱 WHAT ARE THE OUTCOMES OF BECOMING AN EIR?

As an EIR, many of the fundamental pain points are removed from the early days of starting a company:

 - You don’t have to stealthily moonlight your startup while juggling another job to pay the bills.
   

 - Your entrepreneurship is institutionally encouraged and fostered.
   

 - You work with a high-agency and low-ego team of potential co-founders / founding engineers.
   

 - You can openly collaborate on your incubation and use our environment as a playground to explore new ideas.
   

 - You work in a system that is rapidly surfacing needs, roadmapping, and iterating on new AI tools/products.
   

 - You serve our clients and company. You grow and learn faster than you have before.
   

After some time, you found your own company, and Sierra does everything we can to set up a great team and suppo

source_jobs.title: Lead AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Lead AI Engineer



🏔️ About Sierra Studio



Sierra Studio is an AI engineering studio and startup incubator – we turn our customers' ideas into reality! We're based in Los Angeles, but our teammates live all around the world. We create products across all areas of software — from web and mobile apps to cutting-edge work at the forefront of AI and large language models.



💼 About The Role



As a Lead AI Engineer, you'll lead engineering for one or more AI initiatives at Sierra. You'll architect the stack, prompt engineer LLMs to solve real world problems, and work with your teammates to ship great products you're proud of. You'll work closely with product managers, designers, and other engineers to take products from idea to production. As an early employee at a startup, you'll also be part of creating our culture!



Here's a taste of what you could do at Sierra!



 - Client projects: Work with a startup founder to build the MVP of their idea

 - Internal projects: Build an internal AI tool to transform our own workflows

 - Hiring: Help us grow our team and interview future candidates

 - Leadership: Mentor other engineers to level up our team



🔎 Who We're Looking For



We're looking for a lead engineer who has experience building great products with LLMs. Work experience, personal projects, or open source — any way you've built things counts.



If you're excited about this role but don't check every box, we'd love to see your application anyway.



✨ LLMs & AI



 - You've shipped something real with LLMs — at work, in a project, or in study

 - Experience with prompt engineering, RAG, and agentic patterns

 - Experience building evals for LLM-powered products

 - Growth mindset: Ability to quickly learn new skills in the AI space



🧑‍🚀 Leadership



 - Experience leading the technical direction of products — formally or informally (tech lead, mentoring, owning a project end-to-end)

 - Ability to work effectively with product, design, and other partners

 - Ability to contribute to multiple projects at the same time

 - Comfortable communicating in English, written and verbal (our clients are US-based)



💻 Software engineering



 - Backend: Either Python (e.g. FastAPI) or TypeScript experience is nice to have!



🔥 Bonus skills – nice to have!



 - Experience with finetuning LLMs

 - Curiosity about new developments in AI

 - Uses AI tools (Cursor, Claude Code, etc) to supercharge your own coding workflow



🌎 How We Work



Fully remote, with flexible hours — we care about output, not hours online. We support work-life balance for teammates at every life stage.



💖 Our culture



 - Growth mindset: We look to magnify our strengths, take chances, and always learn from our mistakes.

 - Supportive: We keep our egos out of the workplace and support each other when trying new things.

 - Product & customer centric: We care deeply about our customers and clients and always keep their needs top of mind. We build tech to solve real problems.

 - Ownership: We take initiative, even when it is "not our job." As a startup, we all wear lots of hats.



💡 Why join us?



At Sierra Studio, we believe in nurturing talent and creating good vibes at work. We seek inclusion and embrace our differences. We're all about "growth mindset", and we look to magnify our strengths, take chances, and always learn from our mistakes. We don't fit our teammates into boxes, and instead we understand that each person has their own unique set of skills that they bring to the table. If you join us, we'll embrace who you are today, and give you the space and tools to keep growing.



Salary Range: $60,000 - $80,000 annually.



Your exact compensation will be determined based on a variety of factors that reflect your individual qualifications and how they align with the needs of the role.

source_jobs.title: CEO
source_jobs.description:
CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER

Stealth AI Startup




THE MOMENT

For the past three years, we’ve been building AI systems. We’ve watched a pattern emerge across the SaaS landscape: companies know they need to become AI-native, they have roadmaps full of commitments, and they’re watching the category shift in real time. These companies are busy with existing customers and their lengthy roadmap. They can’t route the resources to keep up. The gap between ambition and execution is widening.

We’ve built something to close the gap. After six months of development and a live pilot generating real results, we’re ready to bring it to market.

The Opportunity

This is a CEO role at an early-stage, stealth AI startup. The company is being incubated by a venture studio with deep technical roots and a strong network. You won’t be starting from zero. You’ll have a working MVP, a live pilot customer, two technical co-founders, and an ecosystem of genuinely great people behind you.




THE ROLE

In year one, you are the sales motion. Your job is to find the next customers, build relationships with heads of product and engineering at B2B SaaS companies, close deals, and develop the playbook from the ground up.

You’ll own GTM strategy and refine the ICP as you learn what it takes to win. As you prove what works, you’ll build the team and function around it.




WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We are open to a variety of backgrounds. We have two profiles that we think may be particularly strong fits for the role:


The Operator. You’ve sold software or tooling to SaaS companies before, ideally early stage. You’ve built ARR from 0 to 1. You’re comfortable personally carrying the relationships, closing deals, figuring out what resonates. You know the kinds of companies we’re selling to, and you might already know some of the next customers. You thrive without infrastructure around you and you don’t wait for permission to move.


The VC Turned Founder. You’ve spent time on the investing side, you understand what early-stage companies need to win, and you’re ready to operate. You have the network, the market intuition, and the hunger to build something yourself. You can tap into networks or channels of customers based on your existing relationships.

Either way, you bring:

 - Leadership and a mentality centered in service;

 - Strong relationship building and maintenance, with enough charisma to impress but genuine honesty and direct communication;

 - A bias to action — you move fast and figure it out;

 - Comfort with ambiguity — you don’t need a playbook to get started;

 - Resilience — you can handle long, big projects and stay motivated;

 - An ownership mentality — this is your company to build.




WHY JOIN US

The team. We have a high bar. This is true for capability as well as for character. The people you’ll work with are technically strong, emotionally intelligent, and genuinely kind. It’s something we protect.

The backing. You’ll have access to the resources, network, and PMF insight of a venture studio that has been building in AI for years. Many critical pieces are already assembled: working product, a live pilot, and a technical team that has already done some of the hard parts. Your assignment is to join something that's already in motion with strong backing.

The upside. The experience and learning opportunity of a lifetime. With salary ($100-250k) and meaningful equity (5-12%), negotiated case by case depending on experience, fit, and needs.



If this sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
🏔️ About Sierra Studio

Sierra Studio is a product development firm dedicated to empowering founders and business leaders to build impactful products. Our team is committed to delivering high-quality solutions that drive business growth. We prioritize a culture of good vibes, open communication, and continuous learning — giving our people the resources they need to thrive.



🏢 About Our Hiring Partner

You will be embedded at a fast-growing loyalty and referrals platform built specifically for Shopify brands. Our hiring partner helps e-commerce businesses build retention through customizable loyalty programs and referral flows.

This is a pre-seed startup scaling rapidly — the kind of place where the playbooks don't exist yet and you help write them. The team is small, customer-obsessed, and moves fast. If you thrive in ambiguity and like building things from scratch, this is the environment for you.



🖼️ About The Role

As Customer Success Manager, you will own a high-volume book of 100+ Shopify merchants — managing everything from day-to-day support to retention strategy and product adoption. You will be the connective tissue between customers and internal teams, and a key voice in shaping how CS processes evolve. This is a high-ownership role at an early stage. You will not inherit a polished system — you will help build one.



🔨 What You'll Do

 - Manage a book of 100+ Shopify merchants, each with their own Slack channel — spanning strategy, design, and daily support

 - Build genuine relationships with customers and become their go-to for retention strategy and feature adoption

 - Lead proactive outreach, QBRs, and daily triage to keep merchants engaged and successful

 - Surface bugs, log feedback, and help prioritize what matters most to the product and engineering teams

 - Work closely with Product and Engineering to shape onboarding, training, and lifecycle processes
   
   

🔎 What We're Looking For

 - 3+ years in Customer Success, Account Management, or a similar client-facing SaaS role

 - Comfortable with ambiguity, context switching, and high-volume account management

 - Strong communicator — equally effective talking strategy with a CMO or debugging an integration with a developer

 - Technical curiosity: comfortable enough to tweak HTML/CSS, read documentation, or troubleshoot Shopify-related issues

 - Experience with Shopify, e-commerce, or loyalty/retention tools

 - Based on the West Coast or able to cover PST hours

Bonus skills:

 - Exposure to vibe coding, HTML/CSS, or API troubleshooting

 - Early-stage startup experience — especially helping create process from scratch
   
   

🤝 Who We're Looking For

We're looking for someone who doesn't need a playbook to get started. You manage complexity without breaking a sweat, you communicate proactively, and you take ownership of outcomes — not just tasks. You're as comfortable talking churn risk with a founder as you are jumping into a Slack thread to unblock a merchant.



📋 Hiring Process

 1. Hiring Screen with Sierra Studio

 2. Executive Interview with Sierra Studio

 3. Interview with hiring partner leadership



💰 Compensation: 2 - 4K USD



💡 Why Join Us?

At Sierra Studio, you become part of a network of high-caliber professionals embedded at innovative companies. You'll have real ownership, meaningful work, and a team that genuinely invests in the people doing the building.

source_jobs.title: Future Opportunities
source_jobs.description:
FUTURE OPPORTUNITIES AT SIERRA STUDIO



Are you a talented professional looking for exciting career opportunities in innovative companies? Sierra Studio is your gateway to a world of possibilities, both within our own dynamic team and across a curated network of growing startups in the United States. Whether you're passionate about product development, technology, marketing, finance, or any other field, we invite you to join our ecosystem of innovation and growth.




ABOUT SIERRA STUDIO

Sierra Studio operates on two synergistic fronts:

 1. As an innovative product development firm, we empower founders and business leaders to create impactful, meaningful products and companies. Born from a Venture Studio in Los Angeles, we foster a culture of innovation and experimentation.

 2. As a specialized staffing company, we connect talented Brazilian professionals with exciting career opportunities in a highly-vetted community of growing companies in the US.
    
    

Our multifaceted approach encompasses:

 - Creating world-class user experiences

 - Developing sound technical foundations

 - Crafting effective marketing strategies

 - Implementing robust financial planning

 - Ideating and validating new business concepts

 - Launching and scaling innovative companies

 - Connecting top talent with cutting-edge startups
   
   

At Sierra, we value diversity and care deeply about the people we work with, knowing that building high-trust relationships is the key to long-term success.




THE SIERRA ECOSYSTEM

When you apply to Sierra, you're not just applying for a single job – you're joining an ecosystem of opportunities. Here's what that means for you:

 - Automatic eligibility for all relevant opportunities within our network

 - Access to positions both within Sierra Studio and at our partner startups in the US

 - Exposure to a variety of innovative projects and companies

 - Opportunity to grow and evolve your career across different roles and industries




WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We seek talented individuals across various fields, including but not limited to:

 - Product Development

 - Software Engineering

 - UX/UI Design

 - Marketing and Brand Strategy

 - Finance and Business Operations

 - Project Management

 - Business Development

 - Data Analysis



Regardless of your specific role or whether you work directly for Sierra or one of our partner companies, we value professionals who demonstrate:

 - A proactive attitude and growth mindset

 - Excellent communication skills

 - The ability to articulate complex concepts clearly

 - Drive to complete tasks with minimal supervision

 - Openness to learning and being challenged

 - A collaborative spirit and low ego

 - Adaptability to different work environments and cultures




WHY JOIN THE SIERRA ECOSYSTEM?

By applying to Sierra Studio, you open doors to numerous opportunities:

 - Access to roles in innovative startups and growing companies in the US

 - Be part of ideating, validating, and launching new companies

 - Work on diverse and challenging projects across various industries

 - Collaborate with talented, multidisciplinary teams in high-trust environments

 - Enjoy cultures that value inclusion and embrace differences

 - Benefit from our "growth mindset" approach, where we magnify strengths and learn from mistakes

 - Experience workplaces that don't try to fit you into a box, but value your unique skills and perspective



We believe in nurturing talent and cultivating positive relationships. Our goal is to empower the world around us, and that starts by empowering you. When you join the Sierra ecosystem, we'll embrace who you are today and give you the space and tools to keep growing, regardless of your professional background.



Learn more about us on our website (https://www.sierra.studio/) and see how you can be part of our mission to create impactful, meaningful products and businesses, either as part of our team or through our network of partner

source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer (TypeScript, React, Python and FastAPI)
source_jobs.description:
Senior Full Stack Engineer




🏔️ About Sierra Studio



Sierra Studio is an innovative product development firm dedicated to empowering founders and business leaders in their quest to create impactful, meaningful products. Our team of experienced professionals is committed to delivering high-quality solutions that drive business growth. We prioritize a culture of good vibes, open communication, and continuous learning, providing our team members with the opportunities and resources they need to thrive.




🏢 About The Company



You will be embedded at a growing insurance compliance platform that helps businesses track and manage certificates of insurance — ensuring that vendors, subcontractors, and partners carry the right coverage. Clients span industries like construction, property management, and enterprise services.



The company is undergoing a major transformation: moving from a services-based model to a fully automated software platform, powered by AI and LLMs. This is a pivotal moment to join — the team is rebuilding the product from the ground up with a modern stack, and there is high ownership and real architectural influence available.



The engineering team is cross-functional, collaborative, and predominantly Brazilian. Daily standups happen during Brazilian midday. The culture values autonomy, pair programming, deep work, and strong interpersonal communication.




🖼️ About The Role



As Senior Full Stack Engineer, you will provide strategic technical leadership across a modern TypeScript + React + Python + FastAPI codebase. You will work closely with product managers and engineers to architect, plan, and develop robust full stack solutions.



This is a high-ownership role. You will help define how the product evolves, guide technology decisions, mentor a team, and ensure the team ships with quality and speed. You'll be embedded in the client's cross-functional product team (~10 engineers) while being part of Sierra Studio's talent network.




🔨 What You'll Do



- Lead end-to-end development – Oversee the full product lifecycle from initial idea to launch, ensuring cohesion across backend and frontend.

- Craft high-quality code – Produce clear, efficient code; actively participate in code reviews; champion technical excellence.

- Write tech specs – Translate business needs into technically robust, creative solutions.

- Engage with stakeholders – Collaborate closely with product owners and leadership, turning their vision into technical reality.

- Document thoroughly – Create comprehensive technical documentation to simplify onboarding and maintain institutional knowledge.

- Refine best practices – Proactively identify and implement improvements in engineering workflows and processes.

- Manage and mentor engineers – Provide technical guidance, coaching, and career development. Advocate for your team's needs.

- Drive engineering planning – Lead sprint planning, effort estimation, capacity planning, and release management.

- Architect and evolve the stack – Guide technology decisions and stack improvements; anticipate and address scaling challenges.




🔎 What We're Looking For



- 8+ years of software engineering experience, with at least 3 years in a senior or lead role

- Frontend: TypeScript, React

- Backend: Python, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy

- Cloud: Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

- CI/CD: GitHub Actions or equivalent tooling

- Strong written and verbal communication in English

- Growth mindset — comfortable picking up new frameworks and technologies quickly



Bonus skills:

- Experience with document processing and/or OCR tools

- Experience with message queue systems (Kafka, Google Pub/Sub)

- Experience with AI-assisted development tools (e.g. Cursor, Claude Code)

- Experience building products using Generative AI / LLMs




🤝 Who We're Looking For



We're looking for a self-motivated engineer with a strong sense of ownership and autonomy. You're proactive, thrive in a high-trust, high-commun

source_jobs.title: Lead Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Lead Fullstack Engineer



🏔️ About Sierra Studio



Sierra Studio is a product development company with a focus on AI – we turn our customers' ideas into reality! We're based in Los Angeles, but our teammates live all around the world. We create products across all areas of software — from web and mobile apps to cutting-edge work at the forefront of AI and large language models.



💼 About The Role



As a Lead Fullstack Engineer, you'll lead engineering for one or more initiatives at Sierra. You'll architect the stack, write clean code, and work with your teammates to ship great products you're proud of. You'll work closely with product managers, designers, and other engineers to take products from idea to production. As an early employee at a startup, you'll also be part of creating our culture!



Here's a taste of what you could do at Sierra!



 - Client projects: Work with a startup founder to build the MVP of their idea

 - Internal projects: Build an internal AI tool to transform our own workflows

 - Hiring: Help us grow our team and interview future candidates

 - Leadership: Mentor other engineers to level up our team



🔎 Who We're Looking For



Our ideal candidate is a generalist software engineer who loves to learn new things fast! We care about the ability to learn quickly and lead projects from idea to production more than any specific skills.



If you're excited about this role but don't check every box, we'd love to see your application anyway.



Must-haves:



 - 5+ years of experience in Software Engineering, including leading projects or people — formally or informally (tech lead, mentoring, owning a project end-to-end)

 - Experience with end-to-end product development, from idea to production

 - Growth mindset: able to quickly learn new languages, frameworks, and more

 - Comfortable communicating in English, written and verbal (our clients are US-based)

 - Frontend experience: TypeScript, React

 - Backend experience: TypeScript or Python, Node.js or FastAPI

 - Experience with databases (e.g. PostgreSQL, MongoDB, etc)

 - Ability to accurately estimate timelines and scope



Bonus – nice to have:



 - Experience using AI tools for coding (e.g. Cursor)

 - Experience building products using Generative AI / LLMs (e.g. using OpenAI/Anthropic APIs, prompt engineering, RAG, etc)

 - Things you've built that you'd like to show us — work projects, open source, or side projects all count!



🌎 How We Work



Fully remote, with flexible hours — we care about output, not hours online. We support work-life balance for teammates at every life stage.



💖 Our culture



 - Growth mindset: We look to magnify our strengths, take chances, and always learn from our mistakes.

 - Supportive: We keep our egos out of the workplace and support each other when trying new things.

 - Product & customer centric: We care deeply about our customers and clients and always keep their needs top of mind. We build tech to solve real problems.

 - Ownership: We take initiative, even when it is "not our job." As a startup, we all wear lots of hats.



💡 Why join us?



At Sierra Studio, we believe in nurturing talent and creating good vibes at work. We seek inclusion and embrace our differences. We don't fit our teammates into boxes, and instead we understand that each person has their own unique set of skills that they bring to the table. If you join us, we'll embrace who you are today, and give you the space and tools to keep growing.



Salary Range: $60,000 - $80,000 annually.



Your exact compensation will be determined based on a variety of factors that reflect your individual qualifications and how they align with the needs of the role.

notes: AI-focused product development firm with a strong engineering core
